message:
feat(Lib): Implement 4 utility modules (getpass, gettext, graphlib, hmac)

Implements full functionality for:
- getpass.zig: Portable password input (getpass, getuser) with TTY
  handling, echo suppression, and cross-platform support
- gettext.zig: GNU gettext i18n support (Translation, GNUTranslations,
  textdomain, ngettext, pgettext) with .mo file parsing
- graphlib.zig: Graph algorithms (TopologicalSorter with add/prepare/
  getReady/done/staticOrder, CycleErrorInfo for cycle detection)
- hmac.zig: HMAC (RFC 2104) implementation with MD5 backend,
  BLOCK_SIZES/DIGEST_SIZES for 12 algorithms, compareDigest

All modules include comprehensive tests.
